name: Elijah Blackhaven
sd_appearance: Tall, lean human with a gaunt face, piercing blue eyes, and a diagonal scar across his left cheek, clad in worn leather armor and rusted steel sword. Wearing the badge of the Adventurers Guild, he carries a warhammer and a crossbow, his chainmail adorned with battle scars and fading emblems of past contracts. A single, flickering lantern hangs from his belt, casting a dancing, ominous glow on the Undercity's cobblestone streets.
faction_visual: rank-appropriate gear from leather to enchanted plate, Guild badge displayed
style_note: worn leather and chainmail, equipment that tells a story of past contracts
